author: doll-agent
content: Added tests/api_proof.rs with 16 integration tests exercising every public API of ferrolearn-cluster: per-estimator builders, fit, predict (where applicable), transform (KMeans family + GMM + FeatureAgglomeration), fit_predict, predict_proba (GMM + BayesianGMM + LabelPropagation + LabelSpreading), score / score_samples / bic / aic (GMM + BayesianGMM), labels accessors. Iterates every Linkage / CovarianceType / BayesianCovType / WeightPriorType / BisectingStrategy / AgglomerativeLinkage / PoolingFunc / kernel variant. AffinityPropagation tolerates non-convergence on tiny synthetic data. All 16 pass. Final ferrolearn-cluster test count: 348 (299 unit + 16 api_proof + 9 oracle + 5 proptest + 3 sklearn_equiv + 16 doctest).
